<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "12"], y: [143, 1, 1, 4, 14, 3, 3, 9, 2, 1],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

Jan 02, 2021  02:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TeamTrump: 🚨Georgia🚨  Contact House Speaker David Ralston &amp;amp; Senate Majority Leader Mike Dugan!  They must:  ✅Hear the evidence ✅Correct false statements ✅Demand a vote on decertification  Ralston: (404) 656-5020 david.ralston@house.ga.gov  Dugan: (404) 463-2478 mike.dugan@senate.ga.gov&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Jan 02, 2021  04:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our Republican Senate just missed the opportunity to get rid of Section 230</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345111621430091777" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345111621430091777" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2021  07:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Before even discussing the massive corruption which took place in the 2020 Election</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345149555390771201" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345149555390771201" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2021  07:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;....changes made to the voting process</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Jan 02, 2021  07:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;January 6th. See you in D.C. https://t.co/vynZTv9lHb&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345152408591204352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345152408591204352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2021  07:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans should have gotten rid of Section 230 in the Defense Bill</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345154826171260928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345154826171260928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2021  07:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @DonaldJTrumpJr: Alec Baldwin should play Alec Baldwin when SNL parodies his wife pretending she’s Spanish for the last few decades as opposed to the basic white girl from Mass that she actually is.   It would be the first funny thing Saturday Night Live has produced in years.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345154985986813955" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345154985986813955" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2021  07:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you Madison! https://t.co/XyaAHO9CwC&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345155760490164225" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345155760490164225" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2021  07:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Herschel is speaking the truth! Jan 03, 2021  20:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @axios: SCOOP: A  growing number of Republican senators — led by Ted Cruz — are set to announce today they also will object to certifying state Electoral College votes on Wednesday</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345714430634586113" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345714430634586113" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  21:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @EpochTimes: “They fear for their safety and the safety of their families in this hyper-political climate.”  A #Michigan attorney in the case that led to a #ForensicAudit of #VotingMachines asked the court to keep secret the identities of the forensic investigators. https://t.co/HPxA9tQqO4&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345717227534868483" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345717227534868483" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  21:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The vaccines are being delivered to the states by the Federal Government far faster than they can be administered!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345717942978293762" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345717942978293762" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  21:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The number of cases and deaths of the China Virus is far exaggerated in the United States because of @CDCgov’s ridiculous method of determination compared to other countries</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345720107255926784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345720107255926784" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  21:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans in Georgia must be careful of the political corruption in Fulton County</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345723944654024706" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345723944654024706" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  21:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I spoke to Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger yesterday about Fulton County and voter fraud in Georgia. He was unwilling</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345731043861659650" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345731043861659650" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  22:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;“Georgia election data</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345736811906273282" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345736811906273282" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @EvanAKilgore: There&#x27;s a difference between not having the evidence and not hearing the evidence.  Pass it on.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345750833179328514" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345750833179328514" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @CodeMonkeyZ: More interesting is that he suggests the inauguration date of January 20 can be extended. https://t.co/q10hxO6JBB&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345751045364875264" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345751045364875264" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345751094908121102" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345751094908121102" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @CodeMonkeyZ: Hillary canceled her fireworks show a few days before the 2016 General Election. https://t.co/LD9skjYrC3&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345751274386501633" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345751274386501633" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; deposit with custodian; penalty for violation  https://t.co/UZXYC2mQzC https://t.co/pJu5zeIpan&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Jan 03, 2021  23:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @BurgessOwens: If you only do what&#x27;s easy</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345751586002399233" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345751586002399233" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SecPompeo: https://t.co/UvigQGjEsU&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345751784451661825" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345751784451661825" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TheRISEofROD: We The People Refuse To Concede To A Fraudulent Election!!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345751815258845184" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345751815258845184" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SidneyPowell1: This “election” was stolen from the voters in a massive fraud that you &amp;amp; others are now complicit in. American elections are supposed to be completely auditable and transparent.  #WeThePeople demand the Truth &amp;amp; the prosecutions of all who committed voter fraud.  @realDonaldTrump https://t.co/Gd4vNmGxHV&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345752303085760512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345752303085760512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @AmyKremer: The #MarchForTrump bus rolls into Bowling Green today at 12 noon.  Senator @RandPaul</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345752729713586183" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345752729713586183" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @realMikeLindell: I am honored to be invited to speak at the biggest event in DC history! @realDonaldTrump will be our President for the next 4 years!!! https://t.co/GoyzsGa6Rx&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345752835913359367" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345752835913359367" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great! https://t.co/f0nKNPgqWg&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345753039165124610" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345753039165124610" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @AmyKremer: The #MarchForTrump bus has gone to more states than Joe Biden has supporters!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345753106605367298" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345753106605367298" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @AmyKremer: They only had 5 people RSVP and Hunter wasn’t one of them... https://t.co/wf4ksW7eOf&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345753158581170176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345753158581170176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Historic day! https://t.co/k6LStsWpfy&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 03, 2021  23:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @AmyKremer: Leaders! https://t.co/SyqyieyBSh&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345753654087843840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345753654087843840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @AmyKremer: Why are my own #GA Senators ⁦@KLoeffler⁩ &amp;amp; ⁦@Perduesenate⁩ not supporting this effort?  ⁦@SenatorLoeffler⁩ ⁦@sendavidperdue⁩  #DoNotCertify #StoptheSteal #MillionMagaMarch #JAN6 #GAsen #gagop  https://t.co/ZJ8ZSZsZiN&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345753757179637761" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345753757179637761" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2021  23:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @AmyKremer: We are excited to announce the site of our January 6th event will be The Ellipse in the President’s Park</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345753910850560003" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345753910850560003" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2021  01:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;https://t.co/FDUVk8cm9S&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345777194644209667" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345777194644209667" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2021  01:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trump Speaks to State Legislators on Call About Decertifying Election https://t.co/z6BgCAe3zX via @BreitbartNews&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345778965064130563" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345778965064130563" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2021  02:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Swing States did not even come close to following the dictates of their State Legislatures. These States  “election laws” were made up by local judges &amp;amp; politicians</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1345798202650460162" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1345798202650460162" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2021  22:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Pleased to announce that @KLoeffler &amp;amp; @sendavidperdue have just joined our great #StopTheSteal group of Senators. Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346520352827039744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346520352827039744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  02:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @KLoeffler: It’s lunchtime. Have you voted yet?   If you haven’t — GO VOTE and bring 10 people know! Jan 06, 2021  02:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @KLoeffler: Georgia</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346520497723498499" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346520497723498499" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  02:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @Perduesenate: Thank you</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346520633669267457" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346520633669267457" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  02:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Reports are coming out of the 12th Congressional District of Georgia that Dominion Machines are not working in certain Republican Strongholds for over an hour. Ballots are being left in lock boxes</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346521447649390606" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346521447649390606" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  03:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;GEORGIA! Get out today and VOTE for @KLoeffler and @Perduesenate! https://t.co/YKiSx7d7lp&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346538317807034373" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346538317807034373" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  06:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Washington is being inundated with people who don’t want to see an election victory stolen by emboldened Radical Left Democrats. BIG CROWDS! https://t.co/k4blXESc0c&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346588064026685443" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346588064026685443" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  10:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @Jim_Jordan: For nine weeks</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346649087857328128" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346649087857328128" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  10:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;BIG NEWS IN PENNSYLVANIA! https://t.co/7JqTWYUgOr&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346652589673345024" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346652589673345024" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  11:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Looks like they are setting up a big “voter dump” against the Republican candidates. Waiting to see how many votes they need?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346659909492998146" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346659909492998146" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  13:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just happened to have found another 4000 ballots from Fulton County. Here we go!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346685023861272580" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346685023861272580" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  13:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @kayleighmcenany: Why are they stopping the vote count in Democrat Chatham county</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346686936568758275" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346686936568758275" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  13:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TomiLahren: The steal is in the making in Georgia. Wait for it.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346686979325521921" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346686979325521921" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  13:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TomiLahren: I wonder when the water main is gonna burst in Georgia....&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 06, 2021  13:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Get smart Republicans. FIGHT! https://t.co/3fs1oPVnAx&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346693906990305280" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346693906990305280" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  13:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @christina_bobb: Pennsylvania is going to Trump.  The legislators have spoken.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346694608877740032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346694608877740032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  13:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @DanScavino: 🔊WOW! We hear you from the West Wing—THANK YOU❤️🇺🇸🦅 https://t.co/onytmaJUhp&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346694740968878080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346694740968878080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  14:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If Vice President @Mike_Pence comes through for us</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346698217304584192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346698217304584192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  21:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Sleepy Eyes Chuck Todd is so happy with the fake voter tabulation process that he can’t even get the words out straight. Sad to watch!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346805405998075905" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346805405998075905" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  21:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;States want to correct their votes</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Jan 06, 2021  21:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;THE REPUBLICAN PARTY AND</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346809349214248962" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346809349214248962" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  22:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Even Mexico uses Voter I.D.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346822958006886400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346822958006886400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2021  23:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;These scoundrels are only toying with the @sendavidperdue (a great guy) vote. Just didn’t want to announce quite yet. They’ve got as many ballots as are necessary. Rigged Election!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346845109736845318" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346845109736845318" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2021  03:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Please support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement. They are truly on the side of our Country. Stay peaceful!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346904110969315332" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346904110969315332" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2021  04:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am asking for everyone at the U.S. Capitol to remain peaceful. No violence! Remember</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1346912780700577792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1346912780700577792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 06, 2021  17:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Happy Easter to everyone!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_853656735382470656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/853656735382470656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Apr 22, 2021  22:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Thanks you for all of the Trump Rallies today. Amazing support. We will all MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_845781411940454400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/845781411940454400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Apr 28, 2021  11:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Earlier: Kenosha, Wisconsin- touring @Snapon_Tools w/ @GovWalker, @BetsyDeVosED, @stevenmnuchin1, @SenRonJohnson...
```{=html}
#BuyAmericanHireAmerican https://t.co/toWaU7p0y0”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_854458989731602434" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/854458989731602434" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Apr 30, 2021  01:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Record JOBS DAY!! 223K jobs added. Unemployment is 3.8%, lowest in 50 yrs. Black and Asian unemployment hit historic new lows. Adult men and women, and teenagers, are at lowest since 2000. Hourly earnings are up! Tax CUTS are working. America is WINNING BIG under President Trump!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1002602715820756993" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/1002602715820756993" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 02, 2021  18:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Great news. We are only just beginning. Together, we are going to #MAGA! https://t.co/4QayxcKjoR”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_839625545948233730" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/839625545948233730" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 03, 2021  10:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“An honor to host Prime Minister @AbeShinzo in the United States. https://t.co/f6TvfZ6sMj”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830141366059536384" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/830141366059536384" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 04, 2021  16:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Great meeting with @harleydavidson executives from Milwaukee, Wisconsin at the @WhiteHouse.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827214173025271811" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/827214173025271811" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 04, 2021  16:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Join me live from the @WhiteHouse at 8:00pm tonight. #SCOTUS 
https://t.co/7OJvZaW0Y7”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826549073515773952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/826549073515773952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 17, 2021  10:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Congratulations to an exceptionally qualified and respected judge on his confirmation to the Supreme Court! #SCOTUS https://t.co/itTom467MT”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_850391865010597888" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/850391865010597888" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  08:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Congratulations to Justice Neil Gorsuch on his elevation to the United States Supreme Court. A great day for America! #SCOTUS https://t.co/7pjc1UrI8d”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_851572337698676736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/851572337698676736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  09:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“It was an honor to host our American heroes from the @WWP Solider Ride this morning at the @WhiteHouse w/ @FLOTUS, @VP &amp;amp; @SecondLady.
#USA🇺🇸”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_850037444426825728" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/850037444426825728" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  11:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Happy Passover to all those celebrating! Chag Sameach!”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_851581698362019841" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/851581698362019841" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  12:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“.@FLOTUS &amp;amp; I are honored to welcome the President of the People&#x27;s Republic of China, Xi Jinping, &amp;amp; Madame Peng Liyuan to the United States.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_850144244107022336" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/850144244107022336" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  14:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Watch live! #BuyAmericanHireAmerican 🇺🇸 ➡️ https://t.co/H6heSYoTU2”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_854402046367326210" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/854402046367326210" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  17:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Today, I was pleased to announce the official approval of the presidential permit for the #KeystonePipeline. A great day for American jobs!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_845320378725621762" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/845320378725621762" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; May 24, 2021  19:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“We&#x27;re going to use American steel, we&#x27;re going to use American labor, we are going to come first in all deals. ➡️ https://t.co/wH0NMMNfyf”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Jun 07, 2021  09:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“FBI Director Comey says classified leaks to the media have been “unusually active” recently. https://t.co/WumDJSqaFA”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_843876462113554437" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/843876462113554437" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Jul 16, 2021  01:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“We are one people, with one destiny.

We all bleed the same blood.

We all salute the same flag.

And we are all made by the same God.”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_836774995279892480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/836774995279892480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Jul 16, 2021  18:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“A budget that puts #AmericaFirst must make safety its no. 1 priority—without safety there can be no prosperity: https://t.co/A0tlzHutF8”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_842403424486449152" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/842403424486449152" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Jul 30, 2021  18:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Today I met with pharmaceutical executives at the @WhiteHouse...https://t.co/T1L7e8pHG1”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826505081101103104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/826505081101103104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2021  20:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“As we speak, we are removing gang members, drug dealers and criminals that threaten our communities and prey on our citizens. #JointAddress”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_836763907566026752" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/836763907566026752" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2021  21:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“AG Sessions is doing a fantastic job: announced today new steps to dismantle violent gangs like MS-13. I promised to get tough and we are!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_854378726301339648" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/854378726301339648" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2021  21:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“YOUR WEEKLY ADDRESS: https://t.co/iCUns5IOJ5”</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_825435318778212352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/825435318778212352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2021  21:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“I will be America&#x27;s greatest defender and most loyal champion. -DJT”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_825187398644547584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/825187398644547584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2021  21:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“NSA Director Rogers tells Congress unmasking individuals endangers national security. https://t.co/jTwjPINvNh”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_843867194954076161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/843867194954076161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 11, 2021  23:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“FBI Director Comey refuses to deny he briefed President Obama on calls made by Michael Flynn to Russia. https://t.co/cUZ5KgBSYP”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_843863057516380161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/843863057516380161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 12, 2021  08:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“We must provide the men and women of the U.S. Military with the tools they need to prevent war and – if they must – TO FIGHT AND TO WIN.”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_836772084445507584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/836772084445507584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 16, 2021  14:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“#JusticeGorsuch #SCOTUS”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826598937549271042" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/826598937549271042" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Aug 27, 2021  09:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Congratulations to our new Secretary of State Rex Tillerson, sworn-in this evening by @VP Mike Pence. https://t.co/YvLoJZUKj8”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826960559841148929" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/826960559841148929" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Sep 22, 2021  04:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“We will rebuild our MILITARY. We will keep our people SAFE. We will take care of our VETS. We will put #AmericaFirst https://t.co/A0tlzHutF8”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_842472370141052928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/842472370141052928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Sep 25, 2021  19:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“...vast sums of money to NATO &amp;amp; the United States must be paid more for the powerful, and very expensive, defense it provides to Germany!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_843138551239905281" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/843138551239905281" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Dec 22, 2021  06:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“#BuyAmericanHireAmerican: it&#x27;s a pledge!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_842090674275155969" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/842090674275155969" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
```
